Package com.launchdarkly.eventsource

Class ModernTLSSocketFactory

java.lang.Object
javax.net.SocketFactory
javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory
com.launchdarkly.eventsource.ModernTLSSocketFactory
public class ModernTLSSocketFactory extends SSLSocketFactory
An SSLSocketFactory that tries to ensure modern TLS versions are used.
